Event: Enchanted Hustle
Event Date: 12/08/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: T130
Dense Hustle Totem

Once in a while, the unit freezes 3 random enemies for 3 sec. The frozen units can't move or attack, and the cooldown of all their abilities (except those granted by the equipped set) is increased by 3 sac. If the target is already frozen when the ability is cast, they have deep freeze applied to them for 3 sec. They can't move and attack, and the cooldown of all their abilities (except those granted by the equipped set) is increased by 3 sec. When the deep freeze effect wears off, the targets of the ability explode and take 365000 magic damage, and icicles fly out of them, hitting 2 nearby enemies. On hit, the icicles deal 275000 magic damage, increase the cooldown of the target's gear and artifact abilities by 3 sec, and cast stiffness on them. The attack speed of stiffened units is reduced by 35% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 90

User rating: item not rated yet
